details: docs/site-tables.js includes study_family, component_of_dataset_id, count_as_independent_cohort, and overlap_notes in the detailed fields table.
Main table remains limited to ID, dataset/study/accession, omics, disease, population, sample type, access, and source URL.
Search scans Object.values(row), so it searches detail fields including study_family and overlap_notes.
Registry search placeholder now advertises PROTECT, RISK, IBDMDB, scIBD, PURSUIT, pediatric, colon.
RISK overmatches ordinary risk text; add a dedicated Study Family filter later only if user testing shows confusion.
